profile.name: Munaim Khan
profile.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
profile.bio: Building modern web applications with Next.js, React.js, Node.js, Laravel, and MongoDB. Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean code and intuitive user experiences.

narrative: I build modern web applications that balance performance, scalability, and user experience.
By combining frontend creativity with backend engineering, I transform ideas into reliable digital products that deliver real value.

projects.title: Idea Vault
projects.subtitle: Startup Idea Sharing Platform
projects.description: A dynamic platform for entrepreneurs to share, track, and discuss startup concepts.
features: Full CRUD operations for idea management
projects.challenges: Implementing real-time interaction tracking without sacrificing performance.
projects.solutions: Utilized efficient state management and optimized database queries.

projects.title: Online Job Portal - JobPulse
projects.subtitle: Web Application • 2024
projects.description: A comprehensive C2C property rental platform featuring advanced user management, seamless booking system, intelligent property search with filters, and secure payment integration.
projects.challenges: Integrating a reliable payment gateway and ensuring real-time booking updates.
projects.solutions: Implemented webhook listeners for payment verification and utilized database transactions for atomic booking operations.

projects.title: SkillSphere
projects.subtitle: Online Learning Platform
projects.description: An intuitive educational platform focused on smooth course discovery and student profile tracking
projects.challenges: Handling dynamic ranking and ensuring secure social authentication.
projects.solutions: Deployed custom server-side ranking algorithms and implemented Better Auth library for robust security.

experience.description: Led full-stack development projects using Laravel, PHP, and WordPress for various clients.
